2024-25 Long Beach State Beach Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 7-25 (3-17, 10th in Big West MBB)

Coach: Chris Acker

PS/G: 67.2 (328th of 364)

PA/G: 74.2 (246th of 364)

SRS: -10.29 (295th of 364)

SOS: -0.53 (143rd of 364)

ORtg: 100.8 (315th of 364)

DRtg: 111.2 (332nd of 364)
